algorythmChanged.title: Security algorythm changed
bodyStrings: It is necessary to carry out simultaneous rotations in the following combinations
<table class='ui definition table center aligned email-table'>

initialEmail.title: Re: Sterilizer settings
bodyStrings: Unfortunately it has not turned completely automated, will expose the temperature manually.
But at least there no risk to spoil reagent
And yes, congratulations on a breakthrough! I think after the vaccine synthesis, you have to buy a separate storage for all of your awards and medals.

initialSentEmail.title: Sterilizer settings
bodyStrings: Mark, I need you to set up a sterilizer on the boundary values, which lie on a common ftp to my folder named sterilizer.tx.
I have to be absolutely sure that avoid any risk of damage to the reagent. Ideally, the sterilizer must itself exhibit the desired temperature and maintain it.
The current system is a bit annoying, especially now that I am so close to the result.

strings.email_retention_policy: Message earlier {0} were removed due to corporate security policy.

strings.compose:email:caption: Compose new message
strings.plans:game_description: Game mode of observation. Position the red dots may not coincide with the position of the players on the screen. You can turn on and off the light in the room and it will appear on the state of the game.
strings.plans:infected_description: Avoid direct contact! Individuals are aggressive, they are attracted to light and heat. The lack of stimuli behave passively.
strings.plans:mutating_description: The conversion does not occur immediately, the infected individual remains of the mind remain, but behave similarly infected - go to the light and warmth are trying to eat living flesh.
strings.plans:died_description: DEAD or no signs of life
strings.plans:detector_deactivated_description: On this floor the equipment breaks down
